statements: The geometry is authored by a deterministic Tessaryn object profile.
The cinematic payload drives internal material state and never defines geometry.
World Cell identity commits the descriptor and every cinematic media chunk.
Power House binds PHA identity, Rootprint replay, and a portable Memory Capsule.
SLBIT meaning remains removable and distinct from the committed object core.
